case_title: SAMUEL HARVELL et al VS. THERESA CAMI TSENG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HARVELL, SAMUEL MILTON, SYLVIA AS TO DEFENDANT TSENG, THERESA CAMI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TSENG, THERESA CAMI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-02-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TSENG, THERESA CAMI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARVELL, SAMUEL MILTON, SYLVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSENG, THERESA CAMI $1,325.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00, (THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2,150.00, SUSTAINED BY PLAINTIFF MILTON, AND $500.00 DAMAGES SUSTAINED BY PLAINTIFF HARVELL. HOWEVER, THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF HARVELL, SUCH THAT THE JUDGMENT IS ADJUSTED ACCORDINGLY.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2008 - CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
